## DAG Elaboration Iter-001 Summary

**Status: COMPLETE**

### What was built
- **21 blueprint declarations** written in `blueprint/src/chapters/Overview.tex`, forming a single connected DAG with 61 dependency edges.
- **0 isolated nodes**, **0 infinity-effort nodes**, **0 broken `\uses{}`**, **0 missing `\lean{}`** annotations.
- All declarations grounded in verbatim SOURCE QUOTEs from `references/MR4433079-intersection-complexes.tex`.

### Mathematical coverage
The blueprint covers the full mathematical roadmap of Sakellaridis–Wang (2020):
- **Definitions**: reductive group data, affine spherical variety, colors/cocharacter monoid $\mathfrak{c}_X$, type-T condition, arc space, IC function, global model, Zastava model, compactified Zastava, central fibers, Kashiwara crystal axioms, crystal of a representation, MV cycles
- **Theorems**: IC formula for affine closure (Thm 1.1), general IC formula (Thm 1.2), nearby cycles–asymptotics commutation (Thm 1.5), stratified semi-smallness (Thm 1.4), dimension estimates (Thm 1.8), crystal structure (Thm 1.6)
- **Corollaries**: asymptotics + Plancherel density (Cor 1.3), minuscule case (Cor 1.7)

### Strategy adopted
- **Axiom-first**: sheaf-theoretic machinery declared as named `axiom` stubs in `Axioms.lean`
- **Primary target**: Crystal theorem (Thm 1.6) — tractable without sheaf theory
- **Two parallel lanes**: combinatorial+crystal vs. axiom layer+geometric models
